shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch inside a messaging interface surrounded by diverse bot icons representing the breadth of the Telegram bot ecosystem
assets.caption: Hatch inside a messaging interface surrounded by diverse bot icons representing the breadth of the Telegram bot ecosystem
assets.prompt: Telegram Bot Platform | hero: Hatch mascot (HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing inside a messaging chat interface, surrounded by various small bot icons — a news bot, a shopping bot, a game bot — all accessible directly in the chat. The scene feels like a bazaar inside a conversation. Cream background, no text overlays. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing toward a developer receiving a bot API token from BotFather in a simple chat window
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing toward a developer receiving a bot API token from BotFather in a simple chat window
assets.prompt: Telegram Bot Platform | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator pose, gesturing toward a developer sitting at a laptop. On the screen: a chat window with BotFather, the Telegram bot that creates bots. The developer is receiving an API token in the conversation. No app store, no approval process, no download — just a message thread that unlocks a distribution channel. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark same as hero. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.

assets.alt: Hatch observing a three-step diagram from developer message to BotFather to global bot distribution
assets.caption: Hatch observing a three-step diagram from developer message to BotFather to global bot distribution
assets.prompt: Telegram Bot Platform | failure-mechanism: Hatch in a thinking pose, observing a three-step diagram: a developer sends a message to BotFather → receives an API token → a bot appears in Telegram search accessible to all users worldwide. The path from idea to distribution is three steps inside a messaging app. Cream background. Watermark same. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
